subject: Re: Download links broken on warpem.com
body:
Hi Dennis,

I’d recommend following the retraining guide <http://www.warpem.com/warp/?page_id=137> and training your own network (then uploading the weights to zenodo and posting here! 😉) rather than sticking with an old version of warp because of the pretrained weights for masking fiducials.

Cheers,

Alister

> On 27 Sep 2023, at 18:03, Dennis Michalak <dennisjmichalak@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
> Are there new links to the previous versions of Warp? We had a previous workflow using 1.0.9 and the nightly build (before 1.1.0). The neural network model used for the teamtomo tutorial is not compatible with 1.1.0 as far as I'm aware. 
> 
> Dennis
> 
> --
